# scoring-app Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-04-02

## Active Technologies

- TypeScript (Node.js LTS) + Next.js (2 apps: customer + merchant), Tailwind CSS, Prisma ORM, QR scanning library (e.g., ZXing) (001-qr-loyalty-webapp)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript (Node.js LTS): Follow standard conventions
